description: Create a map of Africa in gvSIG Desktop using the shapefiles located in /home/ga/gvsig_data/ (ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp, ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp, and ne_110m_populated_places.shp). Ensure the layers are ordered with populated places on top, rivers in the middle, and countries on the bottom. Export the view showing the African continent as a PNG image to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/africa_rivers_map.png.
